title: A round multicolor UFO was seen moving vertically in Alcobaça-BA [1994]
excerpt: DEC 14th, 1994. Time: 01:15 am. Duration: 20 minutes. In the city of Alcobaça, in the south of Bahia, two people observed a round UFO “bigger than a star”, varying in colors and speed. text_preview:
DEC 14th, 1994. Time: 01:15 am. Duration: 20 minutes. In the city of Alcobaça, in the south of Bahia, two people observed a round UFO “bigger than a star”, varying in colors and speed. According to the witness who reported the sighting to COMDABRA [Brazilian Aerospace Defense Command], the UFO was in the East, about 39km from the nearby city of Caravelas, in a restricted area of ​​the Brazilian Navy, and it was seen performing vertical maneuvers.

Cf. ARQUIVO NACIONAL (Brasil). Sistema de Informações do Arquivo Nacional (SIAN). Fundo ‘Objeto Voador Não Identificado (OVNI)’. Código de Referênci
summary: Two people in Alcobaça-BA watched a round multicolor UFO performing vertical maneuvers near a Brazilian Navy restricted area for 20 minutes on December 14, 1994.
